import { Link, useNavigate } from "react-router-dom"; import { Trash2, Plus, Minus, ShoppingBag, ArrowLeft } from "lucide-react"; import MarketplaceLayout from "@/layouts/MarketplaceLayout"; import { useCart } from "@/contexts/CartContext"; export default function Cart() { const navigate = useNavigate(); const { cartItems, removeFromCart, updateQuantity, getTotalPrice, getTotalItems } = useCart(); if (cartItems.length === 0) { return (

Shopping Cart

Your cart is empty

Discover our curated collection of Indian luxury fashion and add items to get started.

Continue Shopping
); } const subtotal = getTotalPrice(); const shipping = subtotal > 5000 ? 0 : 299; const tax = Math.round(subtotal * 0.18); const total = subtotal + shipping + tax; return (
{/* Breadcrumb */}

Shopping Cart

{/* Cart Items */}
{cartItems.map((item) => (
{/* Image */}
{/* Details */}

{item.name}

{item.category}

{item.currency} {item.price.toLocaleString()}

{/* Quantity & Action */}
{item.quantity}
))}
{/* Continue Shopping */} Continue Shopping
{/* Order Summary */}

Order Summary

Subtotal ({getTotalItems()} items) INR {subtotal.toLocaleString()}
Shipping {shipping === 0 ? ( Free ) : ( `INR ${shipping}` )}
Tax (18%) INR {tax.toLocaleString()}
Total INR {total.toLocaleString()}
{shipping > 0 && (

Free shipping on orders above INR 5,000

)}
{/* Trust Badges */}

✓ Free Returns within 30 days

✓ Secure Checkout

✓ 100% Authentic Products

 ); }
